title: unona erecta
intro: Unona erecta, also known as African Long Pepper or Wild Pepper, is a tropical plant native to the rainforests of West Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Unona erecta include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Unona erecta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and salves.
